ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geological_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geological period */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the geological sequence */,
  "start_age" INTEGER /* Start age of the geological period in millions of years ago */,
  "end_age" INTEGER /* End age of the geological period in millions of years ago */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the time period in millions of years */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the geological period */,
  "major_events" TEXT /* Key events or phenomena that occurred during the period */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Predominant climate type during the period */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic locations where the period is prominently studied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biological_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological composition entry */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geological period */,
  "microbial" REAL /* Percentage of microbial composition */,
  "oolitic" REAL /* Percentage of oolitic composition */,
  "foram" REAL /* Percentage of foram composition */,
  "algal" REAL /* Percentage of algal composition */,
  "reefal" REAL /* Percentage of reefal composition */,
  "other" REAL /* Percentage of other compositions */,
  "total" REAL /* Total percentage of all compositions */,
  "fossil_types" TEXT /* List of specific fossil types found in the period */,
  "sediment_type" TEXT /* Type of sediment in which the biological components are found */,
  "sampling_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the biological data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data accuracy */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biological_composition_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES geological_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., paleontologist, analyst) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "expertise_area" TEXT /* Specific area of expertise (e.g., vertebrate paleontology, paleobotany) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the researcher has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
